sentences.text: Hey Kathy, this is Dan from rentable we spoke a couple of weeks ago. Now, um, you said you would send over a link to your calendar with some times, I know it can get pretty crazy busy every day um, so just let me know if there's a time that works here this week or next. I'll send you a follow, up email as well. Um, if you'd
like to give me a call back I'm at six one five five one zero six one seven eight thanks so much look forward to hearing back from you would love to chat.
